title: CreateHive+
description: An optimised Minecraft experience, fully compatible with the CreateHive server.
body:
# CreateHive+

<u>**CreateHive+ aims to achieve the best possible gameplay on the modded CreateHive server**</u> through use of various optimisation and quality of life mods, adding features like **shaders with full Create contraption compatibility**, **zoom**, **toggleable fullbright**, **textures** for a **highly aesthetic medieval feel** with a **matching font** and **emoji support**, an **in-game skin switcher** and also **many optimisations** to the game to reduce any lag you may have had joining such a heavily mod-oriented server, especially with all these **extra client-side features**. There's even **keybinds** and **advanced mod config** already done for you!

<details>
<summary>Notes</summary>

This is an optimised, unofficial extension of the CreateHive modpack, ideal for joining the modded server. The IP is `createhive.org` and there's an official Discord server you can join by [clicking here](https://discord.gg/gQkW9ZuFcj) as well as a wiki you can check for tips [here](https://wiki.createhive.org).

This was created with permission kindly granted from the owners of the CreateHive server.

</details>
